title: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus
display_title: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus
wikitext:
[]: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Feb 13, 2018 11:52 am We know that in Neon Genesis, each Moon was fitted with a Lance of Longinus in order to keep one seed dormant if two moons landed on the same planet, which is exactly what happened to Earth. Adam was put into hibernation, allowing Lilith and her offspring to take Earth for themselves and prosper. If these same rules still apply, seeing as how there are four Adams in New Theatrical, perhaps there are four Spears of Longinus. As for the Spear of Cassius, it may have been kept in Lilith's Moon to hold her dormant. I do wonder though, if SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 13, 2018 1:01 pm One of the four Spears at the South Pole was the Spear of Cassius. (It's the one with the non-coiled shaft.) It was blown to the Moon along with the Adam that was turned into Mark.06.

Article: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus
[]: Possible explanations for the multiple Spears of Longinus             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Feb 13, 2018 11:52 am We know that in Neon Genesis, each Moon was fitted with a Lance of Longinus in order to keep one seed dormant if two moons landed on the same planet, which is exactly what happened to Earth. Adam was put into hibernation, allowing Lilith and her offspring to take Earth for themselves and prosper. If these same rules still apply, seeing as how there are four Adams in New Theatrical, perhaps there are four Spears of Longinus. As for the Spear of Cassius, it may have been kept in Lilith's Moon to hold her dormant. I do wonder though, if SPOILER: Show
